metadata.name: rkpc_conventional_radar_sid_derived_geometry
metadata.purpose: Verified derived geometry for selected RKPC conventional/RADAR SID legs. Entries in this file do not authorize runtime procedure routing unless runtime_route_allowed is explicitly true.
rules: Magnetic radials use the project RKPC conversion true_heading = magnetic_heading - 8.
Derived points preserve their source navaid, magnetic radial, true bearing, and DME distance.
Named terminal fixes are validated from the terminal fix register instead of being duplicated as derived points.
Turn capture models define capture tolerances only; they do not authorize runtime path following by themselves.
Partial derived geometry remains blocked for route automation until every required leg and intercept is audited.

procedures.source_section: IPDAS FOUR KILO DEPARTURE chart text
procedures.route_text: Climb on R 067 YDM until D6.5, then turn left to intercept R 013 CJU, then proceed direct to IPDAS.

derived_points.label: YDM R067 D6.5
derived_points.source_text: derived training source text redacted for public OSS dataset

derived_points.label: CJU R013 D30.0
derived_points.source_text: derived training source text redacted for public OSS dataset

derived_segments.blocking_reason: Segment endpoints, capture tolerance, and training runtime path are modeled, but exact chart linework validation is not yet modeled.

derived_segments.source_text: derived training source text redacted for public OSS dataset
derived_segments.blocking_reason: Continuation is validated and included in the training runtime path, but exact chart validation is still pending.

turn_capture_model.blocking_reason: A nominal 250kt/25deg continuous left turn from YDM R067 D6.5 to course 005 does not itself intersect CJU R013. Runtime guidance needs an explicit intercept-heading/path construction before this SID can be enabled.

route.label: YDM R067 D6.5

notes: This route replaces the old YDM-CJU-IPDAS shortcut for training runtime guidance.
Exact published route automation remains disabled until chart linework validation is complete.
Published chart linework remains reference overlay material only and must not drive this training runtime path.

remaining_blockers: cross-check full IPDAS 4K linework against source chart before enabling runtime route
